svg.title: Final sulfur-species number-density profiles from fort outputs after a 60-year PATMO run
svg.desc: Multi-panel plot showing altitude versus number density for sulfur-bearing species dumped by patmo_dumpDensityToFile in the modern sulfur cycle case, with clipped x-axis lower bounds for readability in panels with very large dynamic range.
svg.text: Final sulfur-species profiles from fort.* outputs
Modern sulfur cycle case, final time = 60 years; x-axis = number density (cm^-3), y-axis = altitude (km)
Note: x-axis lower bounds are clipped in very wide-range panels for readability. fort.41 and fort.50 are identical SO3 dumps; fort.43 and fort.46 are identical SO4 dumps.
